user.title: Pollen France
user.description:
Enter the INSEE code of your municipality (5 digits, e.g. 87085 for Limoges).
Latitude/longitude is pre-filled from your Home Assistant configuration.

error.invalid_insee: The INSEE code must be exactly 5 digits.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
